---
title: "GDPR Compliance"
title-block-style: none
description: "Expert GDPR compliance services including data mapping, privacy impact assessments, breach response planning, and privacy-by-design implementation for organizations processing EU personal data."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #81BD4A; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:70vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/lock-keyboard.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>GDPR <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Compliance</span></h1>
    <p>Practical data protection that keeps your organization compliant without slowing you down.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="ev-btn">Book a consultation</a>
      <a href="#services" class="ev-btn-ghost">Explore services</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS BAR -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">EUR 20M</div><div class="m-nl">Max fine</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">4%</div><div class="m-nl">Global turnover</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">Every</div><div class="m-nl">EU org</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">Your</div><div class="m-nl">Rights</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SERVICE OVERVIEW -->
<div class="m-s" id="services" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Four pillars of GDPR readiness</h2>
    <p class="sub">Comprehensive services to achieve and maintain data protection compliance.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i><h3>Data Mapping</h3><p>Complete inventory of personal data flows, processing activities, legal bases, and third-party transfers across your organization.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>Privacy by Design</h3><p>Embed data protection into your systems, products, and processes from the ground up — not as an afterthought.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-check"></i><h3>DPIA Assessments</h3><p>Data Protection Impact Assessments for high-risk processing activities, with clear mitigation strategies and documentation.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i><h3>Breach Response</h3><p>Incident response planning, 72-hour notification procedures, and breach management frameworks that meet regulatory expectations.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE ROW 1 -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/analyst-monitors.webp" alt="GDPR compliance monitoring"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Compliance that doesn't<br>slow you down.</h2>
        <p>Too many organizations treat GDPR as a checkbox exercise — a stack of policies nobody reads. We take a different approach. Our compliance frameworks are designed to integrate with your existing workflows, not replace them.</p>
        <p>We focus on practical implementation: clear data processing registers, automated consent management, and privacy controls that your team will actually use. Compliance becomes a competitive advantage, not a burden.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Start your assessment</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE ROW 2 -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-overhead.webp" alt="GDPR audit process"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>From audit to<br>certification.</h2>
        <p>Our structured process takes you from initial assessment to full GDPR alignment. We begin with a comprehensive audit of your current data processing activities, identify gaps against regulatory requirements, and deliver a prioritized remediation roadmap.</p>
        <p>Every recommendation comes with clear implementation guidance, timeline estimates, and resource requirements. We stay with you through implementation, testing, and ongoing monitoring to ensure sustained compliance.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Request a GDPR audit</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WHO NEEDS GDPR -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Who needs GDPR compliance?</h2>
    <p class="sub">Any organization that processes personal data of EU residents.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shop"></i><h3>E-Commerce</h3><p>Online retailers processing customer data, payment information, and shipping details.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-building"></i><h3>Enterprises</h3><p>Organizations with employee data, CRM systems, and multi-country operations.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-heart-pulse"></i><h3>Healthcare</h3><p>Medical providers handling sensitive patient data and health records.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-bank"></i><h3>Financial Services</h3><p>Banks, insurers, and fintech companies processing financial and identity data.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i><h3>Education</h3><p>Schools, universities, and edtech platforms managing student and staff records.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-globe"></i><h3>SaaS & Tech</h3><p>Software companies processing user data, analytics, and behavioral information.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-megaphone"></i><h3>Marketing</h3><p>Agencies and platforms handling contact lists, tracking, and profiling data.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Non-Profits</h3><p>Charities and NGOs managing donor, volunteer, and beneficiary information.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EUROPEAN POSITIONING -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="European data protection"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>GDPR native.<br>Not retrofitted.</h2>
        <p>Based in Romania and operating across the EU, we built our practice inside the GDPR framework from the beginning. We understand the regulation not as foreign compliance overhead, but as the natural way to handle data in Europe.</p>
        <p>This means our recommendations are practical, our templates are battle-tested in EU jurisdictions, and our approach reflects how European regulators actually interpret the rules — not how American consultancies guess they might.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RELATED SERVICES -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Related services</h2>
    <p class="sub">GDPR compliance works best as part of a broader security strategy.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i><h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3><p>Align your cybersecurity governance with EU NIS2 Directive requirements alongside your GDPR program.</p><a href="/services/nis2/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Security</h3><p>Blue team operations, threat hunting, and security assessments to protect the data you're processing.</p><a href="/security/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud Services</h3><p>GDPR-compliant cloud architecture with data residency controls and encryption at every layer.</p><a href="/services/cloud/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to get<br>GDPR compliant?</h2>
    <p>Book a consultation with our data protection experts and get a clear path to compliance.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Book a consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free initial assessment &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> No obligation &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> EU-based expertise
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
